name: Submantle
description: The credit bureau for AI agents. Submantle records behavioral interactions between AI agents and businesses, computes trust scores (SubScore) using a Beta distribution formula, and provides a query API for businesses to check agent trust levels before interacting. Neutral infrastructure — Submantle never enforces, only labels. Agents register free; businesses pay to query at scale.

skills.name: Trust Score Query
skills.description: Query the SubScore for any registered AI agent by name or ID. Returns trust score (0.0–1.0), score version, history flag, reporter diversity count, and interaction statistics.
examples: What is the trust score for agent 'myagent'?
Has this agent been verified before?
How many incidents has this agent had?

skills.name: Agent Registration
skills.description: Register a new AI agent with Submantle to begin building a trust history. Registration is free and permanent — agent names are retained even after deregistration.
examples: How do I get a Submantle trust token for my agent?

skills.name: Business API Access
skills.description: Register a business to receive an API key for querying trust scores at scale. Tiers: Anonymous (10/hr), Free (100/hr), Paid (1000/hr). Stripe integration for paid tier.
examples: How does a business access Submantle scores?
What are the rate limits for the Submantle API?
How do I get a paid API key?

skills.name: Incident Reporting
skills.description: Report behavioral incidents against a registered agent. Incidents enter a pending state before affecting the score. Reporting requires authentication — only registered members can file reports.
examples: How do I report a problem with an agent?
What happens when an incident is reported?

skills.name: MCP Trust Surface
skills.description: Read-only MCP server at /mcp (HTTP transport). Exposes 7 trust query endpoints for AI agents to verify other agents inline during task execution.
examples: How do I connect to the Submantle MCP server?
Can my agent verify other agents via MCP?

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Business API key (sk_live_...) for paid-tier rate limits on /api/verify and /api/verify/{agent_name}
